# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "servicePrincipalName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "subscriptionId": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.AAD/servicePrincipals",
      "apiVersion": "2015-08-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('servicePrincipalName')]",
      "properties": {
        "displayName": "[parameters('servicePrincipalName')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2020-04-01-preview",
      "name": "[guid(parameters('subscriptionId'), parameters('servicePrincipalName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.AAD/servicePrincipals', parameters('servicePrincipalName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[concat('/subscriptions/', parameters('subscriptionId'), '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b2a7b970-3c5e-466d-82f9-fde57f6ebe46')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.AAD/servicePrincipals', parameters('servicePrincipalName')), '2015-08-01-preview').appId]",
        "scope": "[subscription().id]"
      }
    }
  ]
}
